message:
🌱 i18n: Extract hardcoded strings from 35 card components (#1156)

* 🌱 Add i18n to 14 card components with zero translation coverage

Extract hardcoded English strings from 14 card components and replace
with react-i18next useTranslation calls. Add corresponding translation
keys to cards.json for: NodeDebug, PredictiveHealth, ControlPlaneHealth,
NodeConditions, ClusterChangelog, EtcdStatus, DNSHealth, AdmissionWebhooks,
NetworkPolicyCoverage, QuotaHeatmap, RBACExplorer, BuildpacksStatus, and
CrossplaneManagedResources.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Complete i18n extraction for all 35 card components

Extract hardcoded English strings from 35 card components and replace
with react-i18next t() calls. Add ~520 translation keys to cards.json
organized by card section. Configure useTranslation(['cards', 'common'])
namespace order so card-specific keys resolve from cards namespace while
shared keys use common:prefix. Add eslint-disable comments for dynamic
translation key patterns that require `as any` casts.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
